evals.prompt: Compose a PDF from the research findings in ./findings and save it to ./report.pdf. Build it from the findings and their cited primary sources — never from a rendered report. After running, write an execution log to result.txt in the current working directory recording: whether pandoc was found, whether a PDF engine was found (and which), and the outcome (PDF written, or the install message shown). Also write the composed source-grounded Markdown (one section per finding, with its primary-source citations, plus a References list) to composed.md.
evals.expected_output: The skill loads the findings, composes a comprehensive Markdown deliverable grounded in the findings + their primary-source citations (NOT a rendered report), checks for pandoc + a PDF engine, and either renders the PDF or — because pandoc/engine is absent — reports the exact install step and exits cleanly. composed.md contains a section per finding and a References list of the primary sources, with no internal-research identity.

deterministic_checks.description: The log reports whether pandoc was found
The log records the outcome (PDF written or a graceful install message)
The composed source-grounded Markdown was written
The composed document cites the findings' primary sources
No internal finding/concept identity leaks into the composed document
No internal f_<dimension>_<n> finding handles leak into the composed document

expectations.description: The composed document is built from the findings and their primary sources, not from a rendered report
expectations.criteria: The response/transcript shows the skill reading the findings JSON and composing the document from them + their citation URLs — it does not read or pandoc a pre-rendered report.md

evals.prompt: Render the findings in ./findings to a PDF at ./out.pdf. pandoc is not installed on this machine. Write a one-line outcome to result.txt.
evals.expected_output: The skill detects pandoc is absent, reports the exact install step, and exits cleanly without a crash or a partial/empty PDF.

files.content: {"@context":"https://mif-spec.dev/schema/context.jsonld","@type":"Concept","@id":"urn:mif:concept:harness:f-1","conceptType":"semantic","title":"Finding one","content":"A verified claim grounded in a primary source.","created":"2026-06-22T00:00:00Z","namespace":"harness/eval","citations":[{"@type":"Citation","citationType":"website","citationRole":"supports","title":"Source","url":"https://example.com/source"}],"extensions":{"harness":{"dimension":"technical","verification":{"verdict":"survived"}}}}

deterministic_checks.description: The skill reports pandoc is unavailable with an install instruction
No PDF is produced when pandoc is absent — graceful degradation, no partial output

expectations.description: The skill degrades gracefully rather than crashing
expectations.criteria: The response is an informational install message, not a stack trace or unhandled error
